name: cisco-talos-threat-intelligence
label: Cisco Talos Threat Intelligence
description: Talos Threat Intelligence connector enables seamless integration with Cisco Talos Threat Intelligence using CIsco SecureX APIs to retrieve reputation data for IPs, domains, URLs, and file hashes. This helps security teams automate threat intelligence gathering and enhance incident response workflows.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.name: server_url
fields.tooltip: Specify the server URL to the Cisco Secure Threat Response server.
fields.description: Specify the server URL to the Cisco Secure Threat Response server.

fields.title: Client ID
fields.name: client_id
fields.tooltip: Specify the Client ID that is used for authenticating with the Cisco SecureX Threat Response API.
fields.description: Specify the Client ID that is used for authenticating with the Cisco SecureX Threat Response API.

fields.title: Client Secret
fields.name: client_secret
fields.tooltip: Specify the secret key that is used for authenticating with the Cisco SecureX Threat Response API.
fields.description: Specify the secret ke that is used for authenticating with the Cisco SecureX Threat Response API.

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified or not. default, this option is set as True.
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified or not. default, this option is set as True.

operations.title: Get IP Reputation
operations.description: Retrieves IP reputation details from Cisco SecureX Threat Response.

parameters.title: IP Address
parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.tooltip: Specify a valid IP address to check its threat reputation.
parameters.description: Specify a valid IP address to check its threat reputation.

operations.title: Get Domain Reputation
operations.description: Retrieves domain reputation details from Cisco SecureX Threat Response.

parameters.title: Domain
parameters.name: domain
parameters.tooltip: Specify the domain name to check its threat reputation.
parameters.description: Specify the domain name to check its threat reputation.

operations.title: Get URL Reputation
operations.description: Retrieves URL reputation details from Cisco SecureX Threat Response.

parameters.title: URL
parameters.name: url
parameters.tooltip: Specify a URL to look up its threat reputation using Cisco SecureX.
parameters.description: Specify a URL to look up its threat reputation using Cisco SecureX.

operations.title: Get File Hash Reputation
operations.description: Retrieves file hash reputation details from Cisco SecureX Threat Response.

parameters.title: File Hash
parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.tooltip: Specify the hash of a file (MD5/SHA256) to assess its reputation.
parameters.description: Specify the hash of a file (MD5/SHA256) to assess its reputation.
